name: silicon-playground
description: Browser playground for the Silicon programming language. The compiler runs fully client-side (no server); the static build inlines it into a single self-contained index.html.

scripts.build: bun run gen-assets && bun run web/build.ts
scripts.verify: bun run gen-assets && bun run web/verify.ts
scripts.smoke: bun run build && bun run web/smoke.ts
